reviews.comment:
Fui bien atendido , muy temprano , pero a la hora de reclamar , el encargado de la mañana , se burló , invento todo tipo de tonterías, ayudado por un playero ,me hizo llenar un formulario , nunca me volvieron a llamar , deje de cargar YPF ! MALA RESPUESTA , MALA GENTE !!

(Translated by Google)
I received good service very early in the morning, but when I complained, the morning manager mocked me, made up all sorts of nonsense, and, aided by an attendant, made me fill out a form. They never called me back, and I stopped buying gas at YPF! Bad service, bad people!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNDM0xfd3RnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy atento el personal de seguridad. La instalaciones perfectamente limpias, en especial: los baños. Muy bien con toallas y secador de manos.
Un poco lentos los playeros, pero... en los ACA... está a la vista que hay más enfoque en los trabajadores que en los clientes.
Los playeros son muy serviciales igualmente.

(Translated by Google)
The security staff was very attentive. The facilities were perfectly clean, especially the bathrooms. They provided towels and hand dryers.
The beach attendants were a bit slow, but... at the ACA... it's clear they focus more on the staff than on the guests.
The beach attendants are very helpful nonetheless.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNDcEx6TVhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Es una unidad servicial del ACA, fuera de este momento particular, estaría bueno que tengan habilitadas siempre todas las dárselas de carga, para ni tener que hacer cola sobre la avenida, dónde ni se debería estacionar

(Translated by Google)
It's a helpful unit of the ACA, and aside from this particular situation, it would be good if they always had all the loading bays open, so we wouldn't have to queue on the avenue, where parking shouldn't even be allowed.
